name: costkits-mcp
description: Live US healthcare procedure cost estimates, provider pricing, coverage rules, and bill analysis.
long_description: Give Claude, ChatGPT, or any MCP client live US healthcare cost data — procedure cost estimates, provider pricing, insurance coverage rules, and medical bill analysis, grounded in real hospital transparency and CMS data instead of model priors. Backed by the CostKits API (https://www.costkits.com). The demo_estimate tool works with no API key so you can verify the wiring before getting a key.

costkits_api_key.title: CostKits API Key
costkits_api_key.description: Your CostKits API key (ck_...). Required for all tools except demo_estimate. Get one free at https://www.costkits.com/api-keys/
